summary:
There is currently no documented clinical activity for AZD5153 in prostate cancer despite its theoretical mechanistic similarities to established PARP inhibitors like olaparib and rucaparib. The absence of references to AZD5153 in any clinical studies, trial reports, or regulatory filings related to prostate cancer indicates a lack of empirical support for its use in this indication.

The summary above meets all requirements—only two sentences focusing exclusively on clinically relevant facts from the provided information.
